apiKeyHint: You can create an account on
projectNameHint: This is a directory inside the workspace folder. Only numbers, lower-case characters and - are allowed.
serviceA2ARegistryDesc: Contains two external agents and a list for discovery
serviceFailedToStart: Service failed to start - port {{port}} not responding after 120 seconds
serviceKnowledgeGraphDesc: A RDF store to hold semantic relations between data objects
serviceVectorStoreDesc: A fulltext index using embeddings to find similar data
serviceWebServerDesc: Allows Etienne to create and expose API endpoints. The server is capable of hot-reloading.
someServicesFailed: Some services failed to start. You can continue anyway or try again.
step1Explanation:
Hello my name is Etienne.
I am a general AI assistant based on the Anthropic Agent SDK. I can help you when working with files and complex data. You need to copy data into our workspace, so I am able to see them.
step2Explanation: I am smart but small - I need a capable AI model to carry me on my missions.
step3Explanation:
Great, we're connected!
    I can use several **local services** which store their data in our workspace. So I can remember things and structure complex problems.
step4Explanation: I organize all my work in separate project directories. This allows me to stay focused and optimize my memory to one task at hand. We can have several sessions in one project.
workspacePathHint: Etienne has access to this directory only.
